text: I find myself wandering through spaces that balance the silence of quiet concentration with the vibrant declaration of innovation. Watching the lone figures behind glass, immersed in their task, I feel a gentle curiosity and distance—am I observer or participant here? The next room, awash in bold color and text, inspires me with its celebration of research and development. I feel drawn to ponder how our thinking evolves alongside our creations. A sense of anticipation for new knowledge stirs in me.
